prompt: deep dive on vector databases — what they are, which ones exist, and how to pick one

assertions.description: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections
Names at least 3 specific vector DB products
assertions.check: at least 3 of: Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, Qdrant, Milvus, pgvector, Faiss, Redis, Elasticsearch

assertions.description: Explains what vector similarity search is
assertions.check: output contains 'embedding' or 'similarity' or 'nearest neighbor' or 'ANN'

assertions.description: Provides criteria for choosing between options
assertions.check: output contains 'choose' or 'pick' or 'select' or 'criteria' or 'depends'

assertions.description: Has a summary or key takeaways section
